title: CustomFieldDefinition
description: A custom field definition with its configuration and type information.

id.description: The unique identifier of the custom field.

name.description: The name of the custom field.

type.description: The type of the custom field.

type_config.description: Configuration specific to the field type. Contains options for dropdown and label fields, currency settings, etc.

default.description: Default option index for dropdown fields.

new_drop_down.description: Whether this is a new-style dropdown.

color.description: The hex color code of the option.

orderindex.description: The order index of the option.

label.description: The label text for the option.

options.description: Available options for dropdown and label fields.

include_guests.description: Whether to include guests for user fields.

include_team_members.description: Whether to include team members for user fields.

precision.description: Decimal precision for number and currency fields.

currency_type.description: Currency type code for currency fields (e.g., USD, EUR).

date_created.description: Unix timestamp when the field was created.

hide_from_guests.description: Whether the field is hidden from guests.

required.description: Whether the field is required on tasks.
